action.reasoning: Observation: Persistent token/feature mismatch error (273 vs 273) despite debug prints matching counts; train.py and predict.py truncated in workspace (incomplete masking/loop/save in train, incomplete point handling/JSON write in predict); test_prep shows good data with bbox/point targets. Pixel values shape [1092,1176] is abnormal (should be e.g. (num_patches,3,28,28)). Analysis: Root cause is incomplete/truncated code + dual-processor template mismatch risk + manual resize interfering with processor's dynamic grid + brittle header search for masking + incorrect tensor shapes for model forward (pixel_values/image_grid_thw need proper batching). Using separate prompt/full processor calls (same image/params) + prompt_len from prompt_inputs guarantees alignment while enabling correct label masking; remove manual resize; use bs=1 manual loop with full tensors; complete all logic + metrics logging. This follows recommended Qwen2VL SFT pattern for grounding. Decision: Overwrite train.py (complete robust Dataset with prompt/full split, proper masking, no manual resize, 64 samples/32 steps, AdamW lr=2e-5, full save of adapter/processor/grid) and predict.py (complete point coord rescale/clip/defaults + JSON output per contract); run test_prep+train then submit_eval to get first grounding_score + iteration time before scaling data/epochs.
